questions.question: All mathematical functions are deterministic.
Which of the following apply to the SUM aggregate function in SQL Server?
options: Compute the sum of all values within the function including Null values
DISTINCT is not a valid argument
Returns data type int or big money
Computes the sum of all non-null values within an expression

questions.question: Which of the following is not true about the AVG function in SQL Server?
options: Unique Values are not considered within the DISTINCT argument
The Group By argument computes the AVG function, based on the group and not\nthe whole table
The over argument divides the result set based upon the FROM clause

questions.question: In SQL Server, which of the following is a valid ALTER statement?
Which of the following statements is used to select the existing database TEST in SQL\nschema?
Which of the following are SQL conjunctive operators?
The formal term for saving changes invoked by a transaction to the database is a(n)\n______.

The following ALTER TABLE statement ______.
ALTER TABLE TestTaking ADD Column
Testscore Int,
Testdate datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT GETDATE(),
options: creates a column with the data type int
creates a column to store test date based upon when the test was taken

questions.question: A multivalued dependency occurs when ______.
options: dependency of an attribute on a set of attributes
dependency formed by two functional dependencies
more than one independent multivalued attributes within a table

questions.question: Non-Clustered indexes sort and store data rows within the table based upon their key\nvalues.
Clustered and Non-Clustered indexes can be unique so that no two rows can have the\nsame values within the index key.
A table that doesn’t have a clustered index is referred to as a ______.
In SQL, indexes that have one or more columns are referred to as which of the\nfollowing?
Besides Clustered and Non-Clustered indexes, other types of indexes include composite,\nunique, and covering.
The acronym ACID stands for the following?
In a relational database, a consistent transaction is ______.
options: a series of actions that needs to be completed in order for the transaction to go\nthrough
an operation that delete all tables
one that creates the structure of a certain database table
one where all data needs to be valid according to all rules including constraints,\ncascades, and triggers

questions.question: Primary key constraints ensure ______.
The SQL keyword that is used to select records from two tables that have matching\nvalues is ______.
The SQL operator that is used to combine the result sets of two or more SELECT\nstatements is ______.
Which of the following is not a subset of DQL?
The SQL function that is used to bring back a certain part of a date as an integer value\nis:
Consider the following SQL statement\nCREATE VIEW Customers\nThe SQL statement ______.
Which of the following is not an SQL trigger type?
The following is the correct order of processing within a typical sql statement: SELECT,\nWHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING
Which of the following statements regarding views is false?
options: Can be used for hiding complexity
DML queries can’t be performed, if there are more than one table within the view
When you drop the base table, the view becomes inactive
All of the above statements are true

questions.question: Which of the following command(s) is/are related to transaction control in SQL?
A subquery in an SQL SELECT statement is enclosed in ______.
The DMLs that require users to specify what data is needed and how to get it, are called:
Which of the following statement is not true about embedded SQL?
options: In embed SQL, all query processing is performed by the database system
Embedded SQL expressions for database modification always returns a result
An embedded SQL program must be processed by a special processor prior to\ncompilation
The exact syntax for embedded SQL request depends on the language in which\nSQL is embedded

questions.question: Which of the following SQL commands will include all records from one table and\nmatch it with a second table?
SQL Server recognizes which of the following classes of constraints?
The SCHEMA_ID in SQL Server ______.
options: returns the schema ID associated with the schema name
returns the schema ID associated with the schema status
returns the schema ID associated with the schema number

questions.question: What effect will a ROLLBACK statement have after a COMMIT has been issued?
options: No effect, COMMIT ends the transaction.
Issuing a prompt to make sure you want to commit the rollback.
All statements within the transaction are rolled back.

questions.question: The following statement creates a copy of the data from one table, and inserts it within\nanother table, so that the data types in both the source and target tables match.
The T-SQL REVOKE clause is used to “REVOKE” <some permission> ON <some object> FROM <some user, login, or group>.
Which of the following statements is true about the HAVING clause?
options: The HAVING keyword collects data across multiple records and groups them by\none or more columns.
The HAVING keyword removes duplications from the results.
The HAVING keyword is used in conjunction with the GROUP BY keyword to\nfilter out certain rows.

questions.question: When three or more AND and OR operators are combined, it is easier to use the\nfollowing SQL keyword(s) ______.
The following SQL is which type of join: SELECT CUSTOMER_T.CUSTOMER_ID,\nORDER_T.CUSTOMER_ID, NAME, ORDER_ID FROM CUSTOMER_T, ORDER_T\nWHERE CUSTOMER_T.CUSTOMER_ID = ORDER_T.CUSTOMER_ID?
Which of the following statements is true concerning subqueries?
options: Do not start with the word SELECT
Involves the use of an inner and outer query
Cannot return the same result as a query that is not a subquery

questions.question: What type of lock will deny users any access to a table?
The INSERT in line l, performs the function of insert values into the columns that are\nwithin the table.
What statement is true about syntax VARCHAR, in line i?
options: Holds a string with a maximum length of 10 characters
Variable width Unicode string data type
The ability to hold a variable amount of characters

questions.question: The code in line a, checks to see if a certain table doesn’t exist within the database.
The ‘dbo’ in a line refers to ______.

What will be the result of: Select e.Department, sum(h.Normalhours) from Employee as\ne inner join HoursVolunteered as h on e.EmpID = h.EmpID where e.Department like\n‘IT’ Group by e.Department ______.
options: shows a total of normal hours volunteered by all departments
shows average of normal hours worked by the IT department
shows a total of normal hours volunteered by the IT department
displays a list of normal hours volunteered by the IT department

questions.question: Primary key values must be unique.
Which of the following performs the ability to insert a data file within a database table\nas a user-specified format within SQL?
Who is considered as the “father” of the relational model for database management?
The SQL ORDER BY clause ______.
options: sorts records among a column either in ascending or descending order
WHERE conditions ASC or DESC are optional within an ORDER BY clause
if no ASC or DESC modifier is not provided, the results will still be sorted in\nascending order
